title: DOI Phase 1 — Initial Maturity Assessment
description: Structured form of assessments/maturity-assessment.md. Captures the 30-question scoring outcome, per-category yes counts, hard-cap gate logic, and resulting maturity level (1-5).

level.description: Final maturity level after applying total score AND hard cap gates.

level_name.description: e.g. 'Information Silos', 'Integratable Cloud', 'Unified Data Layer', 'Automated Workflow with Human-in-the-Loop', 'AI-Driven Automation'.

total_score.description: Sum of yes-responses across all 5 category panels (each panel max 6).

category_scores.description: Per-category yes counts. Each panel has 6 questions, so each value is 0-6.

capped.description: True iff one or more hard cap gates failed and forced level below the score-implied level.

cap_reason.description: Plain-language reason for the cap, or null if no cap applied.

cap_gates_failed.description: Identifiers of the panel items that triggered the cap (e.g. panel2_item0).

primary_goal.description: Reproduced from company-profile.md so downstream tools don't need to re-read it.
